'''lonangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:hibernal|hibernal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-n-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hibernal|hibernal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lonangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lonangithi|lonangithi]] || [[word:lonangiji|lonangiji]] || [[word:lonangishi|lonangishi]] || [[word:lonangiki|lonangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lonanguthuthu|lonanguthuthu]] || [[word:lonangujuju|lonangujuju]] || [[word:lonangushushu|lonangushushu]] || [[word:lonangukuku|lonangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lonanguthu|lonanguthu]] || [[word:lonanguju|lonanguju]] || [[word:lonangushu|lonangushu]] || [[word:lonanguku|lonanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lonangufthuf|lonangufthuf]] || [[word:lonangufjuf|lonangufjuf]] || [[word:lonangufshuf|lonangufshuf]] || [[word:lonangufkuf|lonangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lonangethe|lonangethe]] || [[word:lonangeje|lonangeje]] || [[word:lonangeshe|lonangeshe]] || [[word:lonangeke|lonangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lonangothotho|lonangothotho]] || [[word:lonangojojo|lonangojojo]] || [[word:lonangoshosho|lonangoshosho]] || [[word:lonangokoko|lonangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lonangotho|lonangotho]] || [[word:lonangojo|lonangojo]] || [[word:lonangosho|lonangosho]] || [[word:lonangoko|lonangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lonangofthof|lonangofthof]] || [[word:lonangofjof|lonangofjof]] || [[word:lonangofshof|lonangofshof]] || [[word:lonangofkof|lonangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lonangĂŻfthĂŻf|lonangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lonangĂŻfjĂŻf|lonangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lonangĂŻfshĂŻf|lonangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lonangĂŻfkĂŻf|lonangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lonangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|lonangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lonangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|lonangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lonangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|lonangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lonangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|lonangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lonangĂŻfthĂŻf|lonangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lonangĂŻfjĂŻf|lonangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lonangĂŻfshĂŻf|lonangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lonangĂŻfkĂŻf|lonangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lonangĂŻfthĂŻf|lonangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lonangĂŻfjĂŻf|lonangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lonangĂŻfshĂŻf|lonangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lonangĂŻfkĂŻf|lonangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lonangĂŠthĂŠ|lonangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:lonangĂŠjĂŠ|lonangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:lonangĂŠshĂŠ|lonangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:lonangĂŠkĂŠ|lonangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lonangathatha|lonangathatha]] || [[word:lonangajaja|lonangajaja]] || [[word:lonangashasha|lonangashasha]] || [[word:lonangakaka|lonangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lonangatha|lonangatha]] || [[word:lonangaja|lonangaja]] || [[word:lonangasha|lonangasha]] || [[word:lonangaka|lonangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lonangafthaf|lonangafthaf]] || [[word:lonangafjaf|lonangafjaf]] || [[word:lonangafshaf|lonangafshaf]] || [[word:lonangafkaf|lonangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lonangasha|lonangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lonangshĂ«sha|lonangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lonangrosha|lonangrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lonangmusha|lonangmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lonangyasha|lonangyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golonangnkshĂ«sha|golonangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golonangnkrosha|golonangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golonangnkmusha|golonangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golonangnkyasha|golonangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lonanangasha|lonanangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lonanangshĂ«sha|lonanangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lonanangrosha|lonanangrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lonanangmusha|lonanangmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lonanangyasha|lonanangyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golonanangnkshĂ«sha|golonanangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golonanangnkrosha|golonanangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golonanangnkmusha|golonanangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golonanangnkyasha|golonanangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lenĂŠngasha|lenĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lenĂŠngshĂ«sha|lenĂŠngshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lenĂŠngrosha|lenĂŠngrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lenĂŠngmusha|lenĂŠngmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lenĂŠngyasha|lenĂŠngyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golenĂŠngnkshĂ«sha|golenĂŠngnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golenĂŠngnkrosha|golenĂŠngnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golenĂŠngnkmusha|golenĂŠngnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golenĂŠngnkyasha|golenĂŠngnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lonfangasha|lonfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lonfangshĂ«sha|lonfangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lonfangrosha|lonfangrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lonfangmusha|lonfangmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lonfangyasha|lonfangyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golonfangnkshĂ«sha|golonfangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golonfangnkrosha|golonfangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golonfangnkmusha|golonfangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golonfangnkyasha|golonfangnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
